description: Composition Green and brown printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves, shallow V split neck and split side seams Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This simple yet stylish printed tunic from w has styles with ethnic Indian threads. Combining classic prints with modern cuts and slimming silhouettes, this Indo-Western tunic blends cut, colour and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, salwar, patialas, leggings or even jeggings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
